response.justification: Maria Rodriguez is a capable individual-contributor engineer with broad full-stack and backend experience, but she is fundamentally not a CTO candidate for this role. She has zero demonstrated engineering management or team leadership experience, no track record of scaling organizations, and her AI/agentic exposure is limited to a few weeks of contributor-level work on MCP tooling at her current employer. The role demands 5+ years of senior technical leadership, production multi-agent AI systems at scale, and deep fintech infrastructure expertise — none of which are present in this resume.
strengths: Solid distributed-systems and backend foundation with demonstrated low-latency, high-throughput work at Dunnhumby (millions of req/s) and event-driven architecture through GISCollective
Recent hands-on exposure to agentic workflow infrastructure and MCP code generators, showing awareness of the current AI tooling landscape
Broad polyglot engineering background across TypeScript, D, Node.js, and embedded systems, indicating strong technical adaptability
concerns: No evidence of engineering management, team leadership, or organizational scaling at any level — every role on the resume is an individual-contributor position
AI and agentic production experience is superficial: only ~1–2 months of contributor-level MCP tooling work, with no production multi-agent systems, LLM evaluation, or AI reliability engineering
Fintech depth is thin — RIDE Capital is a single 15-month stint with no mention of credit systems, payment flows, real-time risk, or regulated financial infrastructure

key_factors.factor: No engineering leadership or team management experience
Absence of production multi-agent AI systems experience
Strong distributed-systems and backend technical foundation
